canonical_definition: Contrastive Attribute Analysis, a method and dataset for extracting steering vectors using binary-choice contrastive prompts and evaluating model behavior via output probabilities and GPT-4o mini scoring.
papers: FCMR: Robust Evaluation of Financial Cross-Modal Multi-Hop Reasoning
